Not contested, no appearance, and tentative ruling adopted: Nancy T. Williams on behalf of Brayton Purcell LLP's motion to be relieved as counsel for Adele Bridge and Brian Wilkie, presumed successors in interest of deceased plaintiff Albert Solorzano, Jr., is GRANTED under Code of Civil Procedure section 284(2) and California Rules of Court, rule 3.1362.
